name: Adult Telegram Delivery Bot
description: Heroku-ready Telegram bot with task posting, MongoDB storage, force subscription, access limits, referrals, userbot control, and broadcasting.

ADMIN_ID.description: Telegram numeric admin ID. Multiple IDs may be comma-separated.

MONGO_URI.description: MongoDB connection URI. DATABASE_URL is also accepted only when it contains a mongodb:// or mongodb+srv:// URI.

API_ID.description: Optional Telegram API ID for userbot source collection.

API_HASH.description: Optional Telegram API hash for userbot source collection.
